summary: Faz 7 Security & Performance features fully tested. All 14 backend tests pass. All security features working: Security headers middleware active (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, X-XSS-Protection), JWT token refresh endpoint working, Security Dashboard page loads with KPI cards, audit logging for login success/failed events working, rate limiting active. PMS page still works after previous refactoring.
critical_code_review_comments: Security headers are correctly implemented using ASGI middleware pattern
JWT token refresh creates audit log entry as expected
Failed login audit logs only include tenant_id when user exists (expected behavior - unknown emails don't have tenant)
Security Dashboard correctly displays data from /api/security/summary endpoint
Input sanitization module exists at /app/backend/core/sanitize.py with NoSQL injection, XSS, and path traversal protection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Faz 7 security features verified: Security headers visible via curl -I, JWT refresh at POST /api/auth/refresh-token, Security summary at GET /api/security/summary, audit logs in MongoDB 'audit_logs' collection. Security Dashboard at /app/guvenlik shows 6 KPI cards, API performance metrics, security controls list, and recent security events table. Token Yenile button refreshes JWT and shows toast.

login_audit_failed.note: Requires valid email with wrong password (unknown emails have null tenant_id)
